# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: serving.k8s.io/v1alpha2
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server
spec:
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 443
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-config
spec:
  routes:
    - destination:
        namespace: "default"
        service: "service-a"
      kind: exact
      match:
        protocol: HTTP
        method: GET
        pathPrefix: /api/a
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authz-a
spec:
  allowedNamespaces:
    - "default"
  allowExternal:
    - kind: DNS
      match:
        protocol: HTTP
        method: GET
        pathPrefix: /api/a
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authz-b
spec:
  allowedNamespaces:
    - "default"
  allowExternal:
    - kind: DNS
      match:
        protocol: HTTP
        method: GET
        pathPrefix: /api/b
